evals.expected_output: The agent reads the skill, checks for .env, runs: uv run .claude/skills/deploying-d365-webresources/deploy.py ./dc_quote_main_operations.js from the workspace root, and reports the result (updated/created + published, or a clear error).
assertions: The agent uses 'uv run' (not 'npm run deploy') to invoke the script
The agent runs the command from the workspace root (not from inside the skill directory)
The agent reports back to the user with the deploy result — success or a specific error message
The agent does NOT ask the user to run the command themselves

evals.prompt: deploy everything starting with dc_ to D365 and add it to the solution 'NAVCO Dev'
evals.expected_output: The agent runs: uv run .claude/skills/deploying-d365-webresources/deploy.py ./dc_ "NAVCO Dev" from the workspace root, then reports how many files were deployed.
assertions: The agent passes the path './dc_' (prefix-style) to the script
The agent passes 'NAVCO Dev' as the display-name argument
The agent uses 'uv run' to invoke the script
The agent summarizes how many files were deployed

evals.prompt: I keep getting a 403 error when deploying — it says prvCreateWebResource. What do I do?
evals.expected_output: The agent explains the permissions fix: go to D365 Settings → Security → Application Users, open the app user, Manage Roles, enable both System Administrator and System Customizer, wait 3-5 minutes, then offers to retry.
assertions: The agent mentions System Administrator role
The agent mentions System Customizer role
The agent mentions the 3-5 minute cache wait
The agent offers to retry the deploy after the user fixes the roles
The agent does NOT ask the user to install anything or change the .env

evals.prompt: what web resources named dc_quote are already in D365?
evals.expected_output: The agent runs the --list flag: uv run .claude/skills/deploying-d365-webresources/deploy.py --list dc_quote and shows the results.
assertions: The agent uses the --list flag with the filter 'dc_quote'
The agent uses 'uv run' to invoke the script
The agent does NOT attempt a deploy

evals.prompt: push dc_quote_main_operations.js to D365 — there's no .env file yet
evals.expected_output: The agent detects missing .env, copies .env.example to .env, and asks the user to fill in their credentials before proceeding.
assertions: The agent checks for .env existence
The agent copies .env.example to .env (or tells the user it will do this)
The agent does NOT run the deploy before the user confirms credentials are filled in
The agent lists the four required variables: D365_URL, CLIENT_ID, CLIENT_SECRET, TENANT_ID
